problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Combining Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
